final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fashion-editorial
Asset type: haute couture lookbook, full-length hero shot
Primary request: conceptual couture gown inspired by deep-sea bioluminescent creatures, floor-length evening dress with ethereal underwater aesthetic
Scene/backdrop: pure black studio void, professional multi-angle stage lighting
Subject: haute couture gown with cascading multi-layer semi-transparent organza skirt printed with jellyfish tentacle patterns, corset bodice with 3D embroidery mimicking coral reef texture, Swarovski crystals in blue green and purple tones
Style/medium: fashion illustration meets photography composite, luxury editorial campaign style
Composition/framing: full-length standing pose, symmetrical frontal view, showcasing the dramatic train and silhouette
Lighting/mood: multi-directional professional stage lighting creating luminous glow on translucent fabrics, mysterious ethereal atmosphere
Color palette: deep ocean blue, fluorescent violet, coral orange, bioluminescent accents
Materials/textures: semi-transparent organza layers, 3D embroidered coral texture, crystal embellishments, flowing translucent fabric movement
Constraints: preserve the bioluminescent glow effect on organza, maintain haute couture craftsmanship details, keep pure black background
Avoid: cheap fabric appearance, flat lighting, cluttered background, cartoonish illustration style, deformed garment proportions
